Package logic.counters

package logic.counters
Contains implementations of all interactive kitchen counters.
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    logic
    Contains core game logic, instances, and basic game state enumerations.
    logic.menus
    Contains implementations of the various menus and validation logics for customer orders.
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    BaseCounter
    Abstract base class for all counters.
    ChoppingBoardCounter
    Counter for chopping ingredients.
    Counter
    Generic counter for placing items.
    DeepFryer
    Counter for deep frying ingredients.
    IceCreamMachine
    Counter for making ice cream.
    Mixer
    Counter for mixing ingredients.
    Oven
    Counter for baking ingredients.
    Pot
    Counter for boiling ingredients.
    ServeCounter
    Counter for serving food orders.
    StoveCounter
    Counter for grilling ingredients.
    WaterDispenser
    Counter for dispensing water.
